info.title: IoT DC3 REST API
info.description:
IoT DC3 platform REST API documentation.

Covers all service modules: auth (authentication and authorization),
manager (device/driver/point/profile configuration), data (telemetry,
events, commands, notifications), and agentic (AI chat and tools).

Authentication: obtain a salt and token via /api/v3/auth/token/*, then
use the Authorize button to set X-Auth-Tenant, X-Auth-Login, and
X-Auth-Token. X-Auth-Token is a JSON object {"salt":"...","token":"..."}.

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

post.description: Delete a user record by ID
Generate a random salt for token authentication, valid for 5 minutes
Generate an authentication token, valid for 12 hours
Validate whether the authentication token is still valid
Change a local credential password during login
List memberships for the caller's tenant
Remove a principal from a tenant
Add a principal to the caller's tenant
Delete a tenant record by ID
Enable a service account by ID
Disable a service account by ID
Delete a service account by ID
Delete a role-resource binding record by ID
Delete a role-principal binding record by ID
List roles as a tenant-scoped tree
Delete a role record by ID
Delete a resource record by ID
List menus as a permission-filtered tree
Delete a menu record by ID
Refresh the MCP tool catalog from registered APIs
List MCP connections owned by the current principal
Create an MCP connection for an OAuth client
Register an OAuth client for MCP usage
List OAuth clients owned by the current principal
List MCP tool call audit entries for the caller's tenant
Delete a local credential by ID
Create a local credential for a principal
List identity/authorization change audit entries for the caller's tenant
Delete an API endpoint record by ID

get.description: Get user details by name
Get user details by ID
Get tenant details by ID
Get tenant details by code
Get service account details by ID
List roles bound to a resource
List resources bound to a role
List resources accessible to a principal
List human users bound to a role
List roles bound to a principal
Get role details by ID
Get resource details by ID
Get principal details by ID
Get menu details by ID
Get OAuth authorization server metadata
List a connection tool whitelist
Get local credential details by ID
Check whether a login name is available
List tenant dictionary entries available in Auth Center
Get API endpoint details by ID

RString.description: Unified API response wrapper. Every REST endpoint returns this envelope; the business payload is carried in 'data'.

code.description: Business response code. 'R200' on success, 'R500' on a generic failure; see SuccessCode and ErrorCode for the full set.

data.description: Business data payload; null for operations that return no body or on failure.

Content.description: User identity content carrying personal identity details

UserIdentityExt.description: User identity extension object, embedded inside user VO extension fields

type.description: Type identifier used to parse the JSON extension string into the proper subtype

version.description: Version number used for optimistic locking

remark.description: Description / remark of the extension object

content.description: Extended content payload, distinguished by the type and version fields
